name: @pryzm/plugin-ai-generative
description: PRYZM 2 — AI generative plugin shell (S51 D1). Registers a plugin descriptor + sidebar entry for the `Generate3Options` workflow living in `@pryzm/ai-host`. Lazy: this package contributes ZERO bytes of `AiHost.impl` to the editor's first-paint chunk per [strategic ADR-014]; the workflow itself is wired through `getAiHost()`.
